headline: Oppenheimer Upgrades T-Mobile to Outperform With a $260 Price Target: Can AI Pricing Power Drive the Next Leg?
summary: T-Mobile US (NASDAQ:TMUS) received a fresh analyst upgrade this morning, with Oppenheimer’s Timothy Horan moving the carrier to Outperform from Perform and assigning a $260 price target. The thesis centers on a new angle: T-Mobile’s potential to use artificial intelligence (AI) to lift pricing, cut expenses, and seed new revenue lines. TMUS stock last traded ...
